selected_issues.proposed_change: Rewrite the hero headline and subhead so the first screen states the clinic problem and Webster's promise in one read.

reasoning: Cold-start explore-broadly mode surfaced a clear hero-copy win, so the planner selected one text experiment with the strongest first-scroll upside.
